title: Jimmie Higgins
writer: Upton Sinclair, Isaak Babel, Georgi Tasin
actors: Amvrosi Buchma, Elena Adamaytis-Astangova, Boris Shlikhting
plot: Jimmy Higgings is an worker at a plant making weapons for Tsarist Russia and the German Empire. During World War I, Jimmy speaks at a spontaneous rally against the war. He is arrested. When released, he becomes unemployed. He is h...
